rationale: The citing paper is a methodological synthesis on policy-simulation econometrics, while the cited paper is a domain-specific empirical study on product-line decisions, so topical fit for substantive methodological dependence is not obvious. However, the citing note says it systematically reviewed JMR 1998–2003 empirical articles, and the cited 2001 JMR article plausibly belongs to that reviewed set. With only a DOI-level match and no in-text context, there is not enough evidence to safely drop.
